tests.title: Landing page renders with hero and nav
tests.description: Verify the landing page loads with the Stackwise branding, hero heading, and Try Demo button
steps: Step 2: Wait for page to load
tests.expected_result: Landing page displays with hero heading containing 'Built to Scale' and a 'Try Demo' button
tests.pass_criteria: Text 'Built to Scale' is visible AND a button containing 'Try Demo' is visible

tests.title: Try Demo button enters demo mode and navigates to dashboard
tests.description: Clicking Try Demo should activate demo mode and redirect to /app/dashboard
steps: Step 2: Click the 'Try Demo' button in the hero section
Step 3: Wait for navigation to complete
tests.expected_result: User is redirected to /app/dashboard with demo banner visible
tests.pass_criteria: URL contains '/app/dashboard' AND text 'Dashboard' is visible as an h1

tests.title: Demo banner shows with role switcher
tests.description: In demo mode, the banner should display with Admin/Manager/Requestor role buttons
preconditions: Enter demo mode via Try Demo
steps: Step 2: Check for demo banner text
Step 3: Verify role switcher buttons exist
tests.expected_result: Banner with 'Demo Mode' or 'demo mode' text visible, with three role buttons
tests.pass_criteria: Buttons labeled 'Admin', 'Manager', and 'Requestor' are all visible in the banner area

tests.title: Switching to Requestor role hides admin-only nav items
tests.description: When role is changed to Requestor, Settings and Analytics should not be accessible
steps: Step 2: Click 'Requestor' in the demo banner role switcher
Step 3: Check sidebar for Settings link
tests.expected_result: Settings link should not be visible in the sidebar
tests.pass_criteria: No link with text 'Settings' is visible in the sidebar navigation

tests.title: Dashboard shows metric cards with seed data
tests.description: Dashboard should display 4 metric cards: Total SKUs, In Stock, Low Stock, Out of Stock
steps: Step 1: Enter demo mode and navigate to dashboard
Step 2: Dismiss onboarding tour if present
tests.expected_result: Four metric cards visible with labels Total SKUs, In Stock, Low Stock, Out of Stock
tests.pass_criteria: Text 'Total SKUs' AND 'In Stock' AND 'Low Stock' AND 'Out of Stock' are all visible

tests.title: Onboarding tour auto-starts on first demo visit
tests.description: The onboarding tour overlay should appear automatically when entering demo for the first time
steps: Step 1: Click Try Demo from landing page
Step 2: Wait for dashboard to load
tests.expected_result: Tour overlay with 'Welcome to Stackwise!' text appears
tests.pass_criteria: Text 'Welcome to Stackwise!' is visible within 2 seconds of dashboard load

tests.title: Sidebar navigation to Catalog page
tests.description: Clicking Catalog in sidebar navigates to /app/catalog
steps: Step 2: Click 'Catalog' link in the sidebar
tests.expected_result: Catalog page loads with 'Product Catalog' heading
tests.pass_criteria: URL contains '/app/catalog' AND h1 'Product Catalog' is visible

tests.title: Catalog table renders with seed items
tests.description: The catalog page should show a table with seeded inventory items
tests.expected_result: Table with at least 1 item row is visible
tests.pass_criteria: A table element is visible AND contains at least 1 tbody row

tests.title: Search filters catalog items
tests.description: Typing in the search box should filter the displayed catalog items
preconditions: In demo mode on catalog page
steps: Step 2: Type a known item name into the search input
Step 3: Verify table rows are filtered
tests.expected_result: Only items matching the search term are displayed
tests.pass_criteria: After typing a search term, the number of visible table rows decreases from the initial count

tests.title: Create new item via form sheet
tests.description: Admin should be able to create a new item using the New Item form
preconditions: In demo mode as Admin on catalog page
steps: Step 2: Fill in Name and SKU fields
Step 4: Verify success toast and item appears in table
tests.expected_result: Item is created, toast shows 'Item created', and item appears in the catalog
tests.pass_criteria: Toast with text 'Item created' is visible after form submission

tests.title: Item detail sheet opens on row click
tests.description: Clicking a catalog row should open the detail sheet for that item
preconditions: In demo mode on catalog page with items
steps: Step 1: Click on a table row
Step 2: Wait for detail sheet to appear
tests.expected_result: A detail sheet/panel appears showing the item name and details
tests.pass_criteria: A sheet/dialog element is visible containing item details with tabs (Overview, History)

tests.title: Bulk select items via header checkbox
tests.description: Clicking the header checkbox should select all visible items and show the bulk action bar
preconditions: In demo mode as Admin on catalog page
steps: Step 1: Click the header checkbox in the catalog table
Step 2: Check for bulk action bar
tests.expected_result: All rows are selected and a bulk action bar appears showing count
tests.pass_criteria: Text matching 'selected' is visible in the bulk action bar

tests.title: Requestor cannot see New Item button
tests.description: When role is Requestor, the New Item button should be hidden
preconditions: In demo mode, switch role to Requestor, on catalog page
steps: Step 1: Switch role to Requestor via banner
Step 3: Check for New Item button
tests.expected_result: New Item button is not visible
tests.pass_criteria: No button with text 'New Item' is visible on the page

tests.title: Movements page renders with seed data
tests.description: The movements page should display a table of stock movements
steps: Step 2: Check for heading and movement data
tests.expected_result: Page shows 'Stock Movements' heading and a table with movement rows
tests.pass_criteria: h1 'Stock Movements' is visible AND table has at least 1 row

tests.title: Log Movement form opens and submits
tests.description: Admin should be able to log a new stock movement
preconditions: In demo mode as Admin on movements page
steps: Step 2: Select an item and movement type
tests.expected_result: Movement is logged and success toast appears
tests.pass_criteria: A toast with success message is visible after form submission
tests.failure_reason: Sidebar navigation groups are collapsed and expanding them is unreliable in Playwright. Command palette navigation also times out. Cannot reliably reach movements page to test the form.
tests.blocked_reason: Sidebar collapsible groups prevent reliable navigation to movements page. Previous test (TEST-014) passed but current session cannot reproduce sidebar link visibility. Likely a state/cookie issue between test runs.

tests.title: Suppliers page renders with seed suppliers
tests.description: The suppliers page should list seeded suppliers
steps: Step 2: Check for heading and supplier data
tests.expected_result: Page shows 'Supplier Directory' heading with supplier rows
tests.pass_criteria: h1 'Supplier Directory' is visible AND at least 1 supplier row is shown

tests.title: Supplier detail sheet opens on row click
tests.description: Clicking a supplier row opens the detail sheet
preconditions: In demo mode on suppliers page
steps: Step 1: Click on a supplier row
tests.expected_result: Supplier detail sheet appears with supplier info
tests.pass_criteria: A sheet element is visible containing supplier details

tests.title: Purchase Orders page renders
tests.description: The PO page should display with heading and any existing orders
tests.expected_result: Page shows 'Purchase Orders' heading
tests.pass_criteria: h1 'Purchase Orders' is visible

tests.title: Create new purchase order
tests.description: Admin should be able to create a new PO with line items
preconditions: In demo mode as Admin on PO page
steps: Step 3: Add at least one line item
tests.expected_result: PO is created and appears in the list
tests.pass_criteria: A toast with success message appears after PO creation
tests.failure_reason: Radix Select dropdown for line item selection renders outside viewport. Element is outside of the viewport error when clicking options with force:true.
tests.blocked_reason: PO line item Radix Select dropdown renders options outside the viewport in Playwright. Cannot select a line item to complete PO creation form.

tests.title: Requests page renders with tabs for admin
tests.description: As admin, requests page should show All Requests and Pending Approval tabs
tests.expected_result: Page shows 'Inventory Requests' heading with 'All Requests' and 'Pending Approval' tabs
tests.pass_criteria: Text 'All Requests' AND 'Pending Approval' are visible as tab triggers

tests.title: Create new inventory request
tests.description: Any user should be able to create a new inventory request
preconditions: In demo mode on requests page
tests.expected_result: Request is created with success feedback
tests.pass_criteria: A toast with success message is visible after request creation

tests.title: Locations page renders with tree view
tests.description: The locations page should show location tree and details panel
steps: Step 2: Check for heading and tree
tests.expected_result: Page shows 'Locations' heading with location tree
tests.pass_criteria: h1 'Locations' is visible AND at least one location name is shown

tests.title: Analytics page renders stock overview
tests.description: As admin, analytics page should show Stock Overview tab with charts
steps: Step 2: Check for heading and stock overview tab
tests.expected_result: Page shows 'Analytics' heading with Stock Overview content
tests.pass_criteria: h1 'Analytics' is visible AND text 'Stock Overview' is visible

tests.title: AI Insights page renders with reorder suggestions
tests.description: AI Insights page should show forecast summary and suggestion cards
steps: Step 2: Check for heading and content
tests.expected_result: Page shows 'AI Insights' heading with Beta badge
tests.pass_criteria: Text 'AI Insights' is visible AND text 'Beta' is visible

tests.title: Settings page renders with tabs for admin
tests.description: Admin should see settings page with Categories, Custom Fields, Users etc. tabs
steps: Step 2: Check for heading and tabs
tests.expected_result: Page shows 'Settings' heading with tab options
tests.pass_criteria: h1 'Settings' is visible AND text 'Categories' is visible as a tab trigger

tests.title: Requestor is denied access to settings
tests.description: Switching to Requestor and navigating to settings should redirect to dashboard
tests.expected_result: User is redirected to dashboard with access denied toast
tests.pass_criteria: URL contains '/app/dashboard' after attempting to access settings as Requestor

tests.title: Help page renders with FAQ accordion
tests.description: The help page should show searchable FAQ
steps: Step 2: Check for heading and FAQ content
tests.expected_result: Page shows 'Help Center' heading with FAQ categories
tests.pass_criteria: h1 'Help Center' is visible AND at least one accordion trigger is visible

tests.title: Help search filters FAQ items
tests.description: Typing in the help search should filter FAQ questions
preconditions: In demo mode on help page
steps: Step 1: Type a search term in the help search input
tests.expected_result: FAQ items are filtered to show only matching results
tests.pass_criteria: After typing a non-matching term like 'xyznonexistent', text 'No matching questions' is visible

tests.title: CMD+K opens command palette
tests.description: Pressing Ctrl+K or CMD+K should open the command palette dialog
preconditions: In demo mode on any page
steps: Step 2: Check for command palette dialog
tests.expected_result: Command palette dialog appears with search input
tests.pass_criteria: A dialog with a search/command input is visible

tests.title: Demo banner dismiss button hides banner
tests.description: Clicking X on demo banner should hide it for the session
preconditions: In demo mode with banner visible
steps: Step 1: Click the dismiss (X) button on the demo banner
tests.expected_result: Demo banner is no longer visible
tests.pass_criteria: The demo banner element is no longer visible after clicking dismiss

tests.title: Direct /app navigation without demo redirects to landing
tests.description: Navigating to /app/* without being in demo mode should redirect to /
steps: Step 1: Navigate directly to /app/dashboard without entering demo
tests.expected_result: User is redirected to / (landing page)
tests.pass_criteria: URL is '/' or landing page content is visible

tests.title: Switching to Manager role shows appropriate permissions
tests.description: Manager should see most features except Settings
steps: Step 3: Check that New Item button is visible (managers can manage items)
Step 4: Check sidebar — Settings should be hidden
tests.expected_result: Manager can see catalog actions but not Settings
tests.pass_criteria: Button 'New Item' is visible on catalog page AND 'Settings' link is not visible in sidebar

tests.title: Feature tabs switch content on landing page
tests.description: Clicking Dashboard/Catalog/Analytics tabs in the Product Tour section should change the displayed image
steps: Step 1: Scroll to the Product Tour section
Step 3: Verify the image alt text changes
tests.expected_result: Image switches to show 'Stackwise Catalog view'
tests.pass_criteria: An image with alt text containing 'Catalog' is visible after clicking the Catalog tab

tests.title: Column sorting cycles through asc/desc/unsorted
tests.description: Clicking a sortable column header should cycle sort direction
preconditions: In demo mode on catalog page with items
tests.expected_result: Sort direction toggles through asc → desc → unsorted
tests.pass_criteria: After first click, items are sorted alphabetically; after second click, they are reverse sorted

tests.title: Exit demo returns to landing page
tests.description: Using the exit demo option should return user to the landing page
steps: Step 1: Open user dropdown menu in header
tests.expected_result: User is redirected to landing page at /
tests.pass_criteria: URL is '/' AND 'Try Demo' button is visible
